name: National Achievement Scholarship (African American)

eligibility.other_requirements: Must take PSAT/NMSQT and qualify through the National Achievement Program; note: program was sunset after 2015

stackable_notes: Stackable like National Merit; college-sponsored variations apply.
notes: Program was sunset after 2015 and folded into the National Merit Program. Students who identify as Black/African American now compete through the main National Merit pathway. Advisor reference only.
